overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage in a photorealistic desert environment resembling Monument Valley. A female character walks through arid terrain with iconic red rock formations, navigating from flat valley floor up a steep hillside to a rocky summit labeled 'Brigham's Tomb.'

scene_state.functional_zone: desert valley floor with distant buttes

events.description: camera pans left to reveal additional rock formations including the left mitten butte

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across flat desert terrain toward tall rock spires in the distance

entered.detail: tall thin rock spire with two distinct peaks against the sky
massive red rock butte with flat top and steep sides
arid brown grass covering the desert floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a flat desert valley with dry grass underfoot. The camera pans left to reveal iconic red rock buttes in the distance, including a tall spire ahead and the left mitten formation, all under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert terrain with scattered boulders

events.description: camera passes through dense dry bushes temporarily obscuring the view of the landscape

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky terrain with large boulders scattered on the right side

entered.detail: large reddish rocks scattered across the path
tall dry shrubbery lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues through increasingly rocky terrain with large boulders on the right. The tall spire formation shifts to the right side of the frame as the camera moves past. At approximately 24 seconds, the view is briefly obscured by dense dry bushes.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep grassy hillside with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: climbing up a steep grassy slope toward a large dome-shaped rock formation visible ahead

entered.detail: massive rounded rock formation with vertical striations and smooth faces
expansive desert vista visible from the elevated hillside

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the bushes, the character ascends a steep hillside covered in dry grass. A massive dome-shaped rock formation becomes prominent in the center of the view, while the distant valley opens up to the right. The terrain becomes increasingly rocky as the elevation increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky base of Brigham's Tomb formation

events.description: text overlay 'BRIGHAM'S TOMB' appears identifying the large rock formation

agents.ego_description: approaching the base of the large rock formation, climbing over boulders to reach the viewpoint

entered.detail: small green shrub at the base of the rock formation

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the rocky base of the massive dome formation, climbing over large boulders. The text 'BRIGHAM'S TOMB' appears on screen identifying the landmark. A small green tree is visible at the base as the character approaches the imposing rock face.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a flat desert valley floor up a steep, rocky ascent toward a massive stone landmark. It begins with the character walking through dry grass as the camera pans left to reveal iconic red rock buttes and a tall spire under a clear blue sky. As the terrain becomes increasingly rocky with large boulders, the camera moves past the spire before the view is briefly obscured by dense dry bushes. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the brush to ascend a steep hillside, where a massive dome-shaped rock formation becomes prominent and the distant valley expands to the right. Finally, the camera climbs over large boulders and passes a small green tree to reach the imposing rock face identified as Brigham's Tomb.
